message:
bd-3bxhj.2.6: State effects extraction and capability profiling

State machine, reducer, derived state, and effect semantic extraction
from hooks/events. Maps into FrankenTUI Model/update/subscriptions.

- ComponentStateModel with state vars, reducers, derived, effects
- Effect classification (DataFetch, Timer, EventListener, etc.)
- Capability inference (NetworkAccess, Timers, KeyboardInput, etc.)
- Platform assumption detection (DOM APIs, WebStorage, env vars)
- Risk flag generation from capabilities/assumptions
- Project-level aggregation with global store detection
- Context provider/consumer graph edges
- 30 tests covering all extraction and classification paths

Also fixes clippy lints in composition_semantics.rs (collapsible if)
and style_semantics.rs (for_kv_map) from other agents' work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
